message:
fix: clippy fixes + manifest updates from concurrent agents

Fix items_after_statements in extensions_js.rs and tools.rs.
Add VCR-based E2E TUI tests. Update VALIDATED_MANIFEST with
additional extension entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
